get.description:
Deep readiness probe — checks all infrastructure dependencies.
Returns 200 if ready, 503 if any critical dependency is down.

post.description:
Start processing an audit through the document pipeline.

# BPO mode uses Anthropic Batch API for 50% cost reduction on LLM calls.
# Set X-Delivery-Mode: bpo header to enable automatic batch routing.
# Default: "api" (real-time processing)

get.description: Get the current processing status for an audit.
Get step-by-step timeline for an audit workflow.

post.description:
Resume a failed workflow from its last checkpoint.

Loads the checkpoint to determine which documents were already processed,
then re-launches the workflow skipping completed documents.

Resolve a workflow gate — continue, reject, or escalate.

Stores the gate decision in Redis. If approved, resumes the workflow
by clearing the awaiting_gate status so the engine can proceed.

get.description: Get the current status of a workflow gate.

post.description:
Resolve checklist research elements and execute integration calls.

Accepts the audit's list of research elements and objects, uses the
ResearchResolver to generate integration requests, then fires all
API-backed calls in parallel via the Integrations service.

Elements with source_type "upload", "manual", or "portal" are not dispatched
to integrations. Instead, a ManualTask entry is created in ATOM for each
applicable (element × object) pair so operations team members can track and
complete them via the admin panel.

get.description:
Get research execution status for an audit.

Delegates to the existing workflow status — the caller can use this to
check overall pipeline progress while research runs in the background.

post.description:
Submit multiple audits for batch processing (BPO mode).
Each audit is queued for async processing via the existing pipeline.
Returns immediately with batch_id for status tracking.

get.description: Get status of a batch processing request.

post.description:
Submit a list of audits with their documents for batch processing.

Each item carries its own document list and optional journey override.
Returns immediately with a batch_id; poll GET /api/v1/batch/{batch_id}/status
to track progress.

get.description: Get progress for a batch submitted via POST /api/v1/batch/processar.

BatchProcessarRequest.title: BatchProcessarRequest
BatchProcessarRequest.description: Submit a list of audits with their documents for batch processing.

BatchRequest.title: BatchRequest
BatchRequest.description: Request to process multiple audits in batch (BPO mode).

document_s3_keys.title: Document S3 Keys
document_s3_keys.description: List of documents, each with 's3_key' and optional 'doc_id'

elements.title: Elements
elements.description: Research element descriptors from the checklist

objects.title: Objects
objects.description: Audit subject objects (CPF, CNPJ, matrícula, etc.)

ResearchExecuteRequest.title: ResearchExecuteRequest
ResearchExecuteRequest.description: Trigger research element execution for an audit.

document_s3_keys.title: Document S3 Keys
document_s3_keys.description: Full document list — checkpoint determines which to skip

RetomarRequest.title: RetomarRequest
RetomarRequest.description: Request to resume a failed workflow from its checkpoint.
